requirement_topic.en: OCPP Backend Interoperability and EMI/EMC Interface
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP后台互操作与电磁兼容接口
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP後台互操作與電磁相容介面

summary.en: Moldova charging projects may require OCPP compatibility, communication security profiles, and backend interoperability for operators and tariff settlement, together with electromagnetic compatibility practices for station electronics. Open Charge Alliance documentation and project terms often define the acceptable OCPP version and security class.
summary.zh: 摩尔多瓦充电项目可能要求OCPP兼容性、通信安全模型和后台互操作以支持运营与计费结算，并需考虑充电站电子设备EMC实施。开放充电联盟文档与项目条款常规定义可接受的OCPP版本和安全级别。
summary.zht: 摩爾多瓦充電專案可能要求OCPP相容性、通訊安全模型與後台互操作以支援營運與計費結算，並需考慮充電站電子設備EMC實作。開放充電聯盟文件與專案條款常定義可接受之OCPP版本與安全級別。

standards_or_laws: Applicable electromagnetic compatibility expectations for station equipment

summary.en: Chinese DC chargers often use GB/T 27930 for charger-to-vehicle communication, but this is not a substitute for backend interoperability, cybersecurity, and operator acceptance required for Moldova operations.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电机通常使用GB/T 27930作为充电机与车辆通信协议，但这不能替代摩尔多瓦运营所需的后台互操作、安全控制和运营方验收。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電機通常使用GB/T 27930作為充電機與車輛通信協議，但這不能替代摩爾多瓦營運所需之後台互操作、安全控制與營運方驗收。

standards_or_laws: Operator backend protocol and cybersecurity requirements

gap.en: The gap is defining OCPP scope and safety-electromagnetic design for the Moldova lane, including endpoint URLs, certificate handling, meter data mapping, transaction model, remote update process, and site network architecture.
gap.zh: 摩尔多瓦路线的差距在于明确OCPP范围和电磁电气设计，包括终端URL、证书处理、计量映射、交易模型、远程更新过程及站点网络架构。
gap.zht: 摩爾多瓦路線之差距在於明確OCPP範圍與電磁電氣設計，包括端點URL、憑證處理、計量映射、交易模型、遠程更新流程及站點網路架構。

mandatory_status.target: Usually mandatory when operator, tender, roaming, payment, or safety operation conditions specify OCPP and EMC acceptance; not itself a whole-unit safety certificate
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — GB/T 27930 cannot satisfy backend interoperability requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm exact OCPP version, security profile, and interoperability evidence with the Moldova station operator before shipment. GB/T 27930 alone is insufficient for backend acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应与摩尔多瓦站点运营商确认具体OCPP版本和安全配置及互操作证据。仅有GB/T 27930不足以满足后台验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應與摩爾多瓦場站營運商確認具體OCPP版本和安全配置及互操作證據。僅有GB/T 27930不足以滿足後台驗收。
